programmes.show_description: Two hitchhikers modeling at a creepy English manor become trapped by a witches coven devoted to ritual sex and sacrifice. Once rejected by British censors, Virgin Witch became a cult erotic horror!

programmes.show_name: A Day In The Life Of Beryl Cook
programmes.show_description: A look into the world of Beryl Cook, one of Britain's most popular painters-an irreverent grandmother known for bold art featuring royal fantasies and cheeky scenes like a 'female flasher'.

Explore the sleazy side of 60s London beneath its glittering façade. This documentary takes you deep into Soho to spend time in its seedy bars, strip joints and private clubs.
On a distant planet, a team of scientists is hunted by a monstrous force in Norman J. Warrens cult sci-fi horror. Once labeled a notorious video nasty, it blends terror, gore, and wild fun.
